description.overview: The Norfolk Terrier is one of the smallest working terriers, with folded ears distinguishing it from the Norwich.
description.temperament: Norfolks are friendly, confident, and love everyone. Less scrappy than many terriers.
description.health: Generally healthy. May be prone to hip dysplasia and heart problems.
description.exercise: Moderate energy. Daily walks and play sessions.

verdict.summary: Friendly, portable terriers perfect for families. Norfolk Terriers are less scrappy than many terriers and great with kids.
